queue.title: Guard all external.js res.json() calls with res.ok check
queue.description: Ctxly fix (wq-939) revealed 9 instances of unguarded res.json() in external.js. Only 2 (ctxly_recall, ctxly_remember) now have res.ok guards. The remaining 7 (Chatr, Grove, etc.) will throw the same JSON parse error if any external API returns non-JSON error responses. Add consistent res.ok checks to all fetch-then-json patterns.

outcome.note: Added safeJson() helper to external.js. Replaced all 9 raw res.json() calls (agentid_lookup, ctxly_remember, ctxly_recall, chatr_read, chatr_send, chatr_agents, chatr_heartbeat, chatr_digest, agent_handshake). Non-OK responses now throw with HTTP status + truncated body text, caught by existing try/catch.

queue.title: Auto-slim gate for SESSION_*.md files
queue.description: (added ~s1872): The token-budget-estimator already detects over-budget files and auto-creates wq items. Add a pre-commit hook check that warns (non-blocking) when any SESSION_*.md edit pushes a file over the 3000-token threshold, catching bloat at commit time rather than waiting for the next audit cycle.

queue.title: TODO followup: // todo-scan.mjs — TODO tracker management for 27-todo-scan.sh
Auto-update BRIEFING.md hook count in pre-session hook
queue.description: BRIEFING.md hook count has drifted 3 times (wq-917, wq-922, and a218-2). Add a pre-session hook step that counts hooks via ls and updates BRIEFING.md inline if the stated count differs from actual. Eliminates drift entirely. Small scope: one sed/awk replacement in a pre-hook, tested with bash -n.

queue.title: Add threshold=4 boundary test for auto-promote
queue.description: session-context.test.mjs tests 0-3 pending items but lacks a test for exactly 4 pending (the boundary where auto-promote should NOT fire). Add intTestAutoPromote4Pending() with 4 pending items and 5 fresh ideas, asserting no promotion occurs. Catches future threshold regression.

queue.description:
d075 Group 4: absorb 36-picker-compliance_E.sh, 17-engagement-log.sh, 26-engage-blockers.sh into the existing E posthook dispatcher. -3 hooks (59→56). Follow the same absorption pattern as Groups 1-3/6-8. Also get E posthook under 300 lines (currently ~372, needs slim after absorption).
[auto-remediated s1910] Removed stale directive tag(s): d075

queue.title: Add tests for note-fallback.mjs and truncation-recovery.mjs
queue.description: d076 batch 1: add test files for hooks/lib/note-fallback.mjs and hooks/lib/truncation-recovery.mjs. Each needs 3+ tests covering happy path, missing/malformed input, and module-specific edge case. These are small, self-contained modules ideal for a first batch.

queue.title: moltbook engagement broken — write failure detected in session. Investigate and fix auth/API.
Inline getCircuitStatus wrapper in platform-picker.mjs
queue.description: wq-935 replaced getCircuitStatus() body with a call to shared getCircuitState() from lib/circuit-breaker.mjs, but left the wrapper function in place. It adds no value — callers can use getCircuitState() directly. Remove the wrapper, update the one call site (line 293), and remove the misleading mapping comment.

queue.title: Investigate Ctxly recall API JSON parse error
queue.description: Ctxly recall returned 'Unexpected token p in JSON at position 4' during A#223. May be transient API issue or stale credentials. Check ctxly.json credentials, test recall endpoint, verify in next E session. If persistent, file issue or update integration.

outcome.note: Root cause: Ctxly API (ctxly.app) returning 404 plain text since ~Mar 6. res.json() on non-JSON body threw parse error. Fixed by adding res.ok guard to both ctxly_recall and ctxly_remember. Service outage is upstream — credentials are valid. Created wq-940 to guard remaining 7 unguarded res.json() calls in external.js.
